info.label: What
info.value: The everyday tasks for this repo - same catalog for you, your scripts and your agent.

info.label: Tip
info.value: Press ? on any item for its description. Run headless with: menuki list/exec.

items.name: Restore dependencies
items.description: Download NuGet packages the project needs.
items.help: Run this after a fresh clone or when you change package references.

items.name: Run tests
items.help: Fails fast on the first failing assertion; check stderr for details.

items.name: Check formatting
items.description: Verify code style without changing files.

items.name: Full check (restore → build → test)
items.description: Run the whole verification pipeline in order; stops at the first failure.
items.help: This is what CI runs. Green here usually means green on the server.

on_failure.command: echo '✗ check failed - see output above'

items.name: Publish self-contained binary
items.description: Clean, then publish a single-file self-contained executable.
items.help: Produces a binary that runs without a .NET install. Prints the output path.

steps.command: dotnet publish Menuki/Menuki.csproj -c Release -p:PublishSingleFile=true --self-contained true -r osx-arm64 --nologo

items.name: Install locally
items.description: Build and install the `menuki` binary onto your PATH.

items.name: Tag a release
items.description: Create an annotated git tag for the given version.

action.command_template: git tag -a v{version} -m 'Release v{version}' && echo 'tagged v{version}'

items.name: Commit all
items.description: Stage everything and commit with a message you type.
